info.DAtuviSezaH: ayaM DAtuH 'stutiH' asmin arTe yadA prayujyate tadA gupUDUpavicCipaRipaniBya AyaH 3.1.28 ityanena asmAt svArTe 'Aya' iti sanAdyantapratyayaH viDIyate  Aya-pratyaye kfte agre SezAtkartari parasmEpadam 1.3.78 ityanena kevalaM parasmEpadasyEva pratyayAH viDIyante  api ca ayam Aya-pratyayaH ArDaDAtukapratyayasya vivakzAyAm AyAdaya ArDaDAtuke vA 3.1.31 ityanena vikalpyate ataH pakze Aya-pratyayaM vinA DAtoH anudAttasvaram anusftya AtmanepadasyEva rUpARi Bavanti  'vyavahAre' asmin arTe tu Aya-pratyayaH nEva viDIyate ataH kevalam Atmanepadasya rUpARi Bavanti
info.english_meaning: to deal to transact to do business to barter to praise
info.hindI_arTa: udyoga karanA vyavahAra karanA praSaMsA karanA stuti karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vyAvahArerTe Atmanepadam  kretavyasya dravyasya mUlyanirDAraRAya praSnaprativacanAtmakaH vyavahAraH  stutO parasmEpadam

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yena Danena prapaRaM carAmi' (aTarva॰3.15.5) vyavahartuM paRyadravyasya parimARakalpanaM prapaRa iti sAyaRaH
'vipaRena ca jIvanto varjyAH syurhavyakavyayoH' (manu0 3152) vipaRena vaRijyayA
'nEkadravyoccayavatIM samfdDavipaRApaRAm' (BA0 anu0 3017) vipaRaH krayavikrayAdivyavahAraH ApaRastu nizadyA Bavati upasargakfto'rTaBedaH
'nEkadravyoccayavatIM samfdDavipaRApaRAm' (BA0 anu0 3017) vipaRo vipaRI paRyavITikA ApaRo nizadyA etyAtrApaRanta ityApaRa iti gocarasaMcaretyAdisUtre (pA0 33119) vfttiH
'SunaM no astu prapaRo vikrayaSca pratipaRaH PalinaM mA kfRotu' (aTarva0 3154) pratyAnetuM paradravyasya parimARakalpanaM pratipaRa iti sAyaRaH
